label: Precept apparel requirement
description: An apparel requirement attached to a precept role, with faction category and meme filters.

allowedFactionCategoryTags.label: Allowed faction category tags
allowedFactionCategoryTags.description: This requirement only applies to factions with at least one of these category tags.

disallowedFactionCategoryTags.label: Disallowed faction category tags
disallowedFactionCategoryTags.description: This requirement does not apply to factions with any of these category tags.

anyMemeRequired.label: Any meme required
anyMemeRequired.description: The ideology must have at least one of these memes for this requirement to apply.

requirement.label: Requirement
requirement.description: The apparel requirement specifying body parts, tags, and allowed defs.
